content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile all the findings into a clear report. ## Summary of Findings I've thoroughly searched the codebase. Here's what I found: ### 1) **Homescreen/Main Menu Display** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/home-screen.js` - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/index.html` (lines 34-53) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/styles/home.css` **Key Components:** - The home screen is defined with ID `home-screen` (absolute positioned div) - Contains three main display sections: - Hearts display (`#hearts-display`) - Coins display (`#coins-display`) - Super Streak display (`#super-streak-display`) - displays above the regular streak - Streak display (`#streak-display`) - Start level button **HTML Structure (index.html lines 34-52):** ```html
``` --- ### 2) **"SuperStreak: Wildcard Teleport" Setting** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/index.html` (line 592-594) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/storage.js` (lines 531-548) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/game.js` (line 119) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/settings-dialog.js` (lines 51, 169-170, 290-292) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/merge-processor.js` (lines 227-231) **HTML Setting (index.html line 592-594):** ```html
``` **Storage Functions (storage.js):** ```javascript export function loadSuperStrikeWildcardTeleport() { const saved = localStorage.getItem("match2048_superStrikeWildcardTeleport"); if (saved === null) { return true; // Default: enabled } return saved === "true"; } export function saveSuperStrikeWildcardTeleport(enabled) { localStorage.setItem("match2048_superStrikeWildcardTeleport", enabled.toString()); } ``` **Game Logic (merge-processor.js lines 227-231):** When a 5-line formation is matched and Super Streak is active (≥5), if this setting is enabled, the reward changes from a regular Joker to a **Wildcard Teleport** tile: ```javascript if (is5LineFormation && game.superStrikeWildcardTeleport && game.superStreak >= SUPER_STREAK_THRESHOLD) { specialTileType = "wild_teleport"; } ``` --- ### 3) **upgrade-icon_streak.png Usage** **File Locations:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/assets/upgrade-icon_streak.png` **Usage (home-screen.js lines 116-118):** The icon is displayed in the **Super Streak circular progress indicator** on the homescreen: ```javascript
``` **Visual Display (home-screen.js lines 82-124):** - 120px × 120px circular container with SVG progress ring - Blue-to-purple gradient border (`#3E9DFF` to `#bb00ff`) - Centered icon with text showing progress (e.g., "3/5") - When active (streak ≥ threshold): bounces with pulse-glow animation - CSS classes: `.super-streak-display`, `.super-streak-container`, `.super-streak-icon` **Styling (styles/home.css lines 148-239):** - Icon width/height: 52px, centered in 120px container - Animation: `bounce-icon` (scales 1.0 → 1.1 → 1.0 over 2 seconds when active) - Text displayed below with score format --- ### 4) **Wildcard Teleport Tile Rendering** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/tile-helpers.js` (lines 84-92) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/renderer.js` (lines 173-176) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/merge-processor.js` (lines 229, 251-253) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/styles/game.css` (lines 834-854) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/style.css` (lines 69-70) **Tile Creation (tile-helpers.js):** ```javascript export function createWildTeleportTile(targetValue = null) { return { type: TILE_TYPE.JOKER, // It's a Joker type value: null, targetValue: targetValue, // Can have a preview value specialType: "wild_teleport", // Special type identifier hasBeenSwapped: false, }; } export function isWildTeleportTile(tile) { return tile && tile.type === TILE_TYPE.JOKER && tile.specialType === "wild_teleport"; } ``` **DOM Rendering (renderer.js lines 173-176):** - Added only when `isWildTeleportTile(tile) && !tile.hasBeenSwapped` - CSS class: `wild-teleport-tile` - Base classes: `gem joker-tile wild-teleport-tile` **CSS Styling (game.css lines 834-854):** ```css .gem.wild-teleport-tile { border: 3px solid var(--tile-wild-teleport-border); /* #e040fb - bright magenta/purple */ position: relative; } .gem.wild-teleport-tile::after { content: "🚀"; /* Rocket emoji */ position: absolute; top: -3px; right: -3px; font-size: clamp(8px, 2vw, 16px); width: 40%; height: 40%; border-radius: 35%; background-color: var(--tile-wild-teleport-badge-bg); /* #e040fb */ color: white; font-weight: bold; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } ``` **Visual Result:** - Base tile: Joker-styled (magenta gradient) - Border: 3px solid bright magenta/purple (`#e040fb`) - Badge: Small circular rocket emoji (🚀) in top-right corner with magenta background - Star value: `*` in center (from JOKER type) - Optional preview value: Smaller font showing what it would become (if `targetValue` is set) **Serializer Notation (serializer.js line 7):** - String notation: `JT` = wild_teleport (Joker + Teleport hybrid) --- ## Visual Summary **Homescreen Super Streak Display:** - 120×120px circular progress indicator - Blue-to-purple gradient circle with white ring - Center: `upgrade-icon_streak.png` image bouncing when active - Bottom: "3/5" style progress counter - Appears above regular streak display only when feature is unlocked **Wildcard Teleport Tile:** - Magenta border (`#e040fb`) - White joker `*` in center (or preview value at 70% size) - Rocket emoji 🚀 badge in top-right corner on magenta circular background - Rendered only when not yet swapped - Behaves as Joker type with teleport ability **Setting:** - Located in Settings dialog under "Gameplay" section - Checkbox: "Super Streak: Wildcard Teleport" - Default: Enabled (true) - Effect: When Super Streak is active (≥5 wins), 5-line formations reward Wildcard Teleport instead of regular Joker

toolUseResult.prompt: Find files related to: 1) The homescreen/main menu display, 2) The "SuperStreak: Wildcard Teleport" setting, 3) The upgrade-icon_streak.png usage, 4) Wildcard teleport tile rendering. I need to understand how the homescreen displays the streak icon and how wildcard teleport tiles look. Search thoroughly.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile all the findings into a clear report. ## Summary of Findings I've thoroughly searched the codebase. Here's what I found: ### 1) **Homescreen/Main Menu Display** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/home-screen.js` - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/index.html` (lines 34-53) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/styles/home.css` **Key Components:** - The home screen is defined with ID `home-screen` (absolute positioned div) - Contains three main display sections: - Hearts display (`#hearts-display`) - Coins display (`#coins-display`) - Super Streak display (`#super-streak-display`) - displays above the regular streak - Streak display (`#streak-display`) - Start level button **HTML Structure (index.html lines 34-52):** ```html
``` --- ### 2) **"SuperStreak: Wildcard Teleport" Setting** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/index.html` (line 592-594) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/storage.js` (lines 531-548) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/game.js` (line 119) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/settings-dialog.js` (lines 51, 169-170, 290-292) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/merge-processor.js` (lines 227-231) **HTML Setting (index.html line 592-594):** ```html
``` **Storage Functions (storage.js):** ```javascript export function loadSuperStrikeWildcardTeleport() { const saved = localStorage.getItem("match2048_superStrikeWildcardTeleport"); if (saved === null) { return true; // Default: enabled } return saved === "true"; } export function saveSuperStrikeWildcardTeleport(enabled) { localStorage.setItem("match2048_superStrikeWildcardTeleport", enabled.toString()); } ``` **Game Logic (merge-processor.js lines 227-231):** When a 5-line formation is matched and Super Streak is active (≥5), if this setting is enabled, the reward changes from a regular Joker to a **Wildcard Teleport** tile: ```javascript if (is5LineFormation && game.superStrikeWildcardTeleport && game.superStreak >= SUPER_STREAK_THRESHOLD) { specialTileType = "wild_teleport"; } ``` --- ### 3) **upgrade-icon_streak.png Usage** **File Locations:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/assets/upgrade-icon_streak.png` **Usage (home-screen.js lines 116-118):** The icon is displayed in the **Super Streak circular progress indicator** on the homescreen: ```javascript
``` **Visual Display (home-screen.js lines 82-124):** - 120px × 120px circular container with SVG progress ring - Blue-to-purple gradient border (`#3E9DFF` to `#bb00ff`) - Centered icon with text showing progress (e.g., "3/5") - When active (streak ≥ threshold): bounces with pulse-glow animation - CSS classes: `.super-streak-display`, `.super-streak-container`, `.super-streak-icon` **Styling (styles/home.css lines 148-239):** - Icon width/height: 52px, centered in 120px container - Animation: `bounce-icon` (scales 1.0 → 1.1 → 1.0 over 2 seconds when active) - Text displayed below with score format --- ### 4) **Wildcard Teleport Tile Rendering** **Files:** - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/tile-helpers.js` (lines 84-92) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/renderer.js` (lines 173-176) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/src/merge-processor.js` (lines 229, 251-253) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/styles/game.css` (lines 834-854) - `/Users/garreltmock/Projects/match-2048/style.css` (lines 69-70) **Tile Creation (tile-helpers.js):** ```javascript export function createWildTeleportTile(targetValue = null) { return { type: TILE_TYPE.JOKER, // It's a Joker type value: null, targetValue: targetValue, // Can have a preview value specialType: "wild_teleport", // Special type identifier hasBeenSwapped: false, }; } export function isWildTeleportTile(tile) { return tile && tile.type === TILE_TYPE.JOKER && tile.specialType === "wild_teleport"; } ``` **DOM Rendering (renderer.js lines 173-176):** - Added only when `isWildTeleportTile(tile) && !tile.hasBeenSwapped` - CSS class: `wild-teleport-tile` - Base classes: `gem joker-tile wild-teleport-tile` **CSS Styling (game.css lines 834-854):** ```css .gem.wild-teleport-tile { border: 3px solid var(--tile-wild-teleport-border); /* #e040fb - bright magenta/purple */ position: relative; } .gem.wild-teleport-tile::after { content: "🚀"; /* Rocket emoji */ position: absolute; top: -3px; right: -3px; font-size: clamp(8px, 2vw, 16px); width: 40%; height: 40%; border-radius: 35%; background-color: var(--tile-wild-teleport-badge-bg); /* #e040fb */ color: white; font-weight: bold; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } ``` **Visual Result:** - Base tile: Joker-styled (magenta gradient) - Border: 3px solid bright magenta/purple (`#e040fb`) - Badge: Small circular rocket emoji (🚀) in top-right corner with magenta background - Star value: `*` in center (from JOKER type) - Optional preview value: Smaller font showing what it would become (if `targetValue` is set) **Serializer Notation (serializer.js line 7):** - String notation: `JT` = wild_teleport (Joker + Teleport hybrid) --- ## Visual Summary **Homescreen Super Streak Display:** - 120×120px circular progress indicator - Blue-to-purple gradient circle with white ring - Center: `upgrade-icon_streak.png` image bouncing when active - Bottom: "3/5" style progress counter - Appears above regular streak display only when feature is unlocked **Wildcard Teleport Tile:** - Magenta border (`#e040fb`) - White joker `*` in center (or preview value at 70% size) - Rocket emoji 🚀 badge in top-right corner on magenta circular background - Rendered only when not yet swapped - Behaves as Joker type with teleport ability **Setting:** - Located in Settings dialog under "Gameplay" section - Checkbox: "Super Streak: Wildcard Teleport" - Default: Enabled (true) - Effect: When Super Streak is active (≥5 wins), 5-line formations reward Wildcard Teleport instead of regular Joker

const progressOffset = circumference - (progress / SUPER_STREAK_THRESHOLD) * circumference; const content = `
${progress}/${SUPER_STREAK_THRESHOLD}
`; superStreakDisplay.innerHTML = content; } /** * Check and show feature unlock dialogs for specific features on the home screen * Currently only shows the streak feature unlock dialog on home screen * @param {Match3Game} game - The game instance */ function checkAndShowFeatureUnlockDialogs(game) { const levelConfig = game.levels[game.currentLevel - 1]; if (!levelConfig?.unlockFeature) return; // Support both string and array formats const features = Array.isArray(levelConfig.unlockFeature) ? levelConfig.unlockFeature : [levelConfig.unlockFeature]; // Features to show on home screen: streak and board upgrades const featuresToShowOnHome = [FEATURE_KEYS.STREAK, FEATURE_KEYS.SUPER_STREAK];

content.text: Done. Now when `superStrikeWildcardTeleport` is enabled, the homescreen shows a miniature wildcard teleport tile (magenta gradient with star and rocket badge) instead of `upgrade-icon_streak.png`. When the setting is off, it shows the original streak icon.
